import json
f = '/Users/hectornunez/.claude/projects/-Users-hectornunez-Motus/d958f2c2-0005-4bcd-9f1b-f92753f65147/subagents/agent-a9fba784bf1691b0d.jsonl'
lines = open\(f\).readlines\(\)
last = json.loads\(lines[-1]\)
msg = last.get\('message',{}\)
content = msg.get\('content',''\)
if isinstance\(content, list\):
    for c in content:
        if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text':
            print\(c['text'][-500:]\)
elif isinstance\(content, str\):
    print\(content[-500:]\)
")
